case_title: S.F.MUNI RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FCU VS BOLDEN CHARLIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F.MUNI RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FCU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLDEN CHARLIE $4,470.86 PRINCIPAL, $78.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,549.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
